system.flavor: You radiate an aura of such powerful peace that all close to you, monster or man, find it impossible to raise a hand in violence.
system.effect:
Stance in this stance gain aura 1.
• Attacks from and against all characters in the area gain [-].
• Characters that attack in the aura immediately end their turn after attacking
• Immediately exit this stance and end your turn if you attack
Conserve the base size of the aura by +1 (max base aura 3). This effect stacks, but ends and resets if you exit the aura.
